case_title: TAPIA, JOSEPH JOHN vs. SOHRABPOUR, FARZANCH IND & DBA FAZY'S UNION

docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF TAPIA, JOSEPH JOHN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SOHRABPOUR, FARZANCH IND & DBA FAZY'S UNION ST. FISH MEAT $2,849.21 PRINCIPAL, $80.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,929.21
